mainEntity.name: What is the best factory game for beginners?

acceptedAnswer.text: Shapez 2 is the best entry — no enemies, clean isometric view. Satisfactory is next (3D first-person). Factorio has deepest mechanics but steepest learning curve.

mainEntity.name: How do I optimize production ratios?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our production ratio calculator. Belt speeds: Mk1=60/min, Mk2=120, Mk3=270, Mk4=480, Mk5=780. Underclock unused machines to save power.

mainEntity.name: How do train signals work in Factorio?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rail signals divide tracks into blocks. Chain signals at intersections prevent deadlocks. Rule: Chain Signal before intersection, Rail Signal after.

mainEntity.name: How do I kill the first boss in Valheim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Eikthyr: craft bow + 100 wood arrows, eat 2-3 foods. Summon at Altar with 2 Deer Trophies. Keep distance, dodge lightning strikes. Reward: Hard Antler pickaxe.
